title: CHPM2030 Deliverable D4.1: Conceptual framework for CHPM power plant
author: Ragnarsson, Árni
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This deliverable describes a model framework for a CHPM facility and the approach that will be used to develop a mathematical model that links the different components of the system in an overall system. The model will be used to simulate and optimise a CHPM plant.
steps_raw: This deliverable describes a model framework for a CHPM facility and the approach that will be used to develop a mathematical model that links the different components of the system in an overall system. The model will be used to simulate and optimise a CHPM plant.
